sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98510" key="sumparadi/dwmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπαρα-δίδωμι</orth>, <sense id="n98510.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">give up along with</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg009:p.3P" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cra.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.3P.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
